== Notes for [[Item:Q103542|Q103542]] ==

https://books.google.se/books?id=DfxNAAAAcAAJ&pg=PA25&dq=Genealogique+de+la+Famille+de+Bejar&hl=en&sa=X&ved=0ahUKEwiyqve9mtXfAhVmgaYKHZ-iCPsQ6AEIKjAA#v=onepage&q=Genealogique%20de%20la%20Famille%20de%20Bejar&f=false

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000016753293123

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
